description: The 4StoreyBuilding.inp project is open in eQUEST 3.65. You are working on a building energy model for a site in a heavy snow-belt region (Buffalo, NY). The current model uses a default constant ground reflectance (albedo) of 0.2, which underestimates solar reflection during winter months. Update the 'Ground Reflectance' parameter to use seasonal values: 0.60 for January, February, and December; 0.40 for March; and 0.20 for April through November. Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation and save the project.
